# SubscriptionCloseReason enumeration

How a subscription stream ended (spec §10.7).

```csharp
public enum SubscriptionCloseReason
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| ClientCancel | `0` | The client cancelled the subscription (closed the stream). |
| ServerTeardown | `1` | The server tore the subscription down (e.g. during shutdown). |
| TransportClose | `2` | The underlying transport closed. |
